entry.data:
CLOUDY
SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS MORNING, THEN A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS THIS AFTERNOON
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING WEST AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
WEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTHEAST AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHEAST IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS AROUND 80
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT
